original: The Bio-Enhancement Shield doesn’t offer the same kinetic protection as its U.G.C. counterparts but makes up for this by injecting adrenal boosters in the bloodstream, enhancing one’s reflexes and ability to stay sharp. In addition, it comes with a molecular decomposer that breaks down toxins before they can be absorbed by the user’s body, which helps to defend against the drugs commonly employed by Peacekeeper forces. Manufacturer: unknown.
